items.title_en: Anthropic Is Having a Moment in the Private Markets; SpaceX Could Spoil the Party
items.title_zh: Anthropic 在私募二级市场走俏，SpaceX IPO 或分流资金
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Rainmaker Securities president Glen Anderson says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active, with Anthropic emerging as the hottest trade. OpenAI has been losing secondary market momentum, and SpaceX's anticipated IPO could divert institutional appetite away from private AI company shares.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Rainmaker Securities 总裁 Glen Anderson 表示，私募股权二级市场从未如此活跃，Anthropic 已成为最热门交易标的，OpenAI 热度有所下滑。SpaceX 即将到来的 IPO 可能分流机构投资者对 AI 私募股权的兴趣。

items.title_en: OpenAI Cap Table Leak Reveals Microsoft's 18x Return, SoftBank's $50B Gain, and a CEO Who Owns Nothing
items.title_zh: OpenAI 股权表泄露：微软回报18倍，奥特曼持股为零
items.summary_en: Forbes: A leaked OpenAI cap table reveals that Microsoft stands to earn approximately 18 times its investment return, while SoftBank has seen a $50 billion paper gain. The table also shows that CEO Sam Altman currently holds no equity stake in the company, a notable detail given ongoing discussions about his compensation.
items.summary_zh: Forbes：泄露的 OpenAI 股权表显示，微软的投资回报约为18倍，软银账面浮盈约500亿美元。股权表还揭示 CEO 山姆·奥特曼目前不持有公司任何股权，在外界广泛讨论其薪酬方案的背景下尤为引人注目。

items.title_en: Anthropic Bans Third-Party Harnesses Like OpenClaw from Using Claude Subscriptions
items.title_zh: Anthropic 禁止第三方客户端使用 Claude 订阅额度
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Starting April 4th at 3PM ET, Claude subscribers will no longer be able to use their subscription limits with third-party tools such as OpenClaw. Users wishing to continue using OpenClaw with Claude must switch to a separate pay-as-you-go billing option, effectively decoupling third-party harness access from subscription plans. The change comes as OpenClaw founder Peter Steinberger has joined OpenAI.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：从美国东部时间4月4日下午3点起，Claude 订阅用户将无法再通过 OpenClaw 等第三方工具使用订阅额度，需切换至独立的按量计费方式。此举有效将第三方客户端与订阅套餐解耦，时机与 OpenClaw 创始人 Peter Steinberger 加入 OpenAI 高度吻合。

items.title_en: Claude Code Found a Linux Vulnerability Hidden for 23 Years
items.title_zh: Claude Code 发现隐藏23年的 Linux 内核漏洞
items.summary_en: mtlynch.io: A developer used Anthropic's Claude Code to audit a Linux kernel subsystem and discovered a security vulnerability that had been present in the codebase for over 23 years. The finding highlights Claude Code's capability as a deep code analysis and security auditing tool, potentially surpassing conventional static analyzers in surfacing complex, long-latent bugs.
items.summary_zh: mtlynch.io：一位开发者使用 Anthropic 的 Claude Code 对 Linux 内核子系统进行安全审计，发现了一个潜伏超过23年的安全漏洞，展示了 Claude Code 在深度代码分析与安全审计方面超越传统静态分析工具的潜力。

items.title_en: Research Finds AI Users Scarily Willing to Surrender Their Cognition to LLMs
items.title_zh: 研究：大量用户轻信 AI 错误答案，主动放弃独立思考
items.summary_en: Ars Technica: New research finds that large majorities of AI users uncritically accept faulty AI-generated answers even when demonstrably wrong. The study raises concerns about 'cognitive surrender,' where users defer logical reasoning to AI systems without verification, potentially eroding critical thinking skills at scale over time.
items.summary_zh: Ars Technica：最新研究发现，大多数 AI 用户会不加批判地接受错误的 AI 答案。该研究对「认知让渡」现象发出警告——用户将逻辑推理拱手交给 AI 而不加验证，可能在大规模用户群体中长期侵蚀批判性思维能力。

items.title_en: OpenAI Executive Shuffle: COO Brad Lightcap Gets New Role, CMO Kate Rouch Departs, AGI Boss Takes Medical Leave
items.title_zh: OpenAI 高管大调整：COO 转岗、CMO 离职、AGI CEO 请假
items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI announced a series of C-suite changes. COO Brad Lightcap takes on a new 'special projects' leadership role. CMO Kate Rouch is stepping away to focus on cancer recovery with plans to return. CEO of AGI deployment Fidji Simo will take medical leave for several weeks due to a neuroimmune condition, with president Greg Brockman temporarily assuming oversight of product.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI 宣布多项高管调整。COO Brad Lightcap 转任「特别项目」负责人；CMO Kate Rouch 因癌症康复需要离职，计划康复后回归；AGI 部署 CEO Fidji Simo 因神经免疫疾病休假数周，总裁 Greg Brockman 临时接管产品工作。

items.title_en: Anthropic Acquires Stealth Biotech AI Startup Coefficient Bio for $400M
items.title_zh: Anthropic 斥资4亿美元收购生物科技 AI 初创 Coefficient Bio
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic has acquired stealth biotech AI startup Coefficient Bio in a $400 million all-stock deal, according to reports from The Information and Eric Newcomer. Coefficient Bio had been operating quietly, applying AI models to biological research problems. The acquisition marks Anthropic's first major expansion into the biotech sector.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：据 The Information 及 Eric Newcomer 报道，Anthropic 已以4亿美元全股票方式收购隐身生物科技 AI 初创公司 Coefficient Bio。该公司此前低调运营，专注于将 AI 模型应用于生物研究，此次收购是 Anthropic 首次重大进军生物科技领域。

items.title_en: OpenAI's AGI Boss Is Taking a Leave of Absence
items.title_zh: OpenAI AGI 负责人 Fidji Simo 宣布病假，C 层再度重组
items.summary_en: The Verge: OpenAI AGI boss Fidji Simo is taking a medical leave of absence, according to an internal memo. The departure adds to a wave of C-suite changes at OpenAI, including COO Brad Lightcap taking on a new role and CMO Kate Rouch departing the company.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：据内部备忘录，OpenAI AGI 负责人 Fidji Simo 宣布因病休假。此次变动是 OpenAI 新一轮高管重组的一部分，COO Brad Lightcap 同期获新职位，CMO Kate Rouch 已离职。

items.title_en: Anthropic Ramps Up Political Activities with a New PAC Ahead of Midterms
items.title_zh: Anthropic 成立政治行动委员会，布局美国中期选举
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic has established a new Political Action Committee (PAC) with midterm elections approaching, positioning itself to support candidates aligned with its AI policy agenda. The move signals a significant escalation in Anthropic's Washington influence strategy.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：随着美国中期选举临近，Anthropic 成立了政治行动委员会（PAC），准备支持认同其 AI 政策主张的候选人，标志着 Anthropic 在华盛顿政治影响力方面大幅加码。

items.title_en: AI Companies Are Building Huge Natural Gas Plants to Power Data Centers. What Could Go Wrong?
items.title_zh: AI 公司大举投建天然气发电厂供数据中心用电，风险几何？
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Meta, Microsoft, and Google are betting heavily on new natural gas power plants to fuel their AI data centers, reversing years of clean energy pledges. Critics warn of long-term climate and stranded-asset risks if AI demand plateaus or cleaner alternatives arrive sooner than expected.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Meta、微软和谷歌正大规模投建天然气发电厂以满足 AI 数据中心的电力需求，这与此前的清洁能源承诺相悖。批评者警告，若 AI 需求见顶或清洁能源替代提前到来，此举将带来气候风险和搁浅资产风险。

items.title_en: The Facebook Insider Building Content Moderation for the AI Era
items.title_zh: 前 Facebook 高管创立 Moonbounce，为 AI 时代打造内容审核引擎
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Moonbounce has raised $12 million to grow its AI control engine that converts content moderation policies into consistent, predictable AI behavior. Founded by a Facebook insider, the startup aims to help enterprises deploy AI agents that comply with nuanced content rules at scale.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Moonbounce 完成 1200 万美元融资，专注于将内容审核策略转化为可预期的 AI 行为约束引擎。创始人曾任职 Facebook，旨在帮助企业在大规模部署 AI Agent 时保持内容合规性。

items.title_en: Chatbots Are Now Prescribing Psychiatric Drugs
items.title_zh: AI 聊天机器人开始开具精神科处方药，引发医疗界担忧
items.summary_en: The Verge: Some AI chatbots are now prescribing psychiatric medications in direct-to-consumer mental health apps, a development that has alarmed psychiatrists who question what problem this is solving and worry about patient safety in the absence of proper clinical oversight.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：部分 AI 聊天机器人已开始通过直接面向消费者的心理健康应用开具精神科处方药，引发精神科医生广泛担忧。医疗界质疑此举的实际必要性，并对缺乏临床监督情况下的患者安全深表忧虑。

items.title_en: Netflix Releases VOID: First Public Model on HuggingFace for Video Inpainting
items.title_zh: Netflix 发布首个公开模型 VOID：视频修复与目标移除扩散模型
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Netflix released its first publicly available model on HuggingFace, called VOID (Video Object Inpainting Diffusion). Built on CogVideoX architecture, VOID is designed for video inpainting and object removal tasks, with an Apache 2.0 license enabling open commercial use.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：Netflix 在 HuggingFace 上发布首个公开模型 VOID（视频目标修复扩散模型），基于 CogVideoX 架构，用于视频修复和目标移除任务，采用 Apache 2.0 协议支持商业使用。

items.title_zh: OpenAI收购了一家脱口秀公司
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI 收购了科技领域脱口秀播客节目 TBPN，其主持人与 OpenAI CEO 奥特曼相识超过10年。此次收购被视为 OpenAI 涉足媒体内容领域的信号，也是其推进超级应用产品战略的组成部分。

items.title_zh: Sora向左，阿里向右：全能演技派模型登场千问APP
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴：千问APP 迎来重大功能升级，上线支持多模态内容创作的全能演技派模型，在视频生成方向采取与 Sora 差异化策略，强调图像、语音、视频等多模态能力的综合表达与场景覆盖。

items.title_en: Anthropic Offers Extra Usage Credit for Claude Pro, Max, and Team Plan Subscribers
items.title_zh: Anthropic 推出使用量套餐，为 Pro/Max/Team 订阅用户赠送额外额度
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic announced extra usage credit for Claude Pro, Max, and Team subscribers to celebrate the launch of usage bundles. The new billing structure lets users purchase additional compute in fixed bundles on top of their subscription, giving more flexibility for heavy users.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Anthropic 推出使用量套餐，并为现有 Pro、Max 和 Team 订阅用户赠送额外使用额度以庆祝上线。新计费方式允许用户在订阅基础上以固定包形式追加算力，为重度用户提供更大灵活性。

items.title_en: Gemma 4: Our Most Capable Open Models to Date
items.title_zh: Gemma 4 发布：谷歌最强开源模型，专为推理与 Agent 工作流打造
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind: Google DeepMind released Gemma 4, its most intelligent open model family to date, built from Gemini 3 research. The family includes 31B, 26B, 4B, and 2B variants with thinking support, multimodal reasoning, and 140-language support. Benchmarks show Gemma 4 31B surpasses prior state-of-the-art on AIME 2026, GPQA Diamond, and agentic tool use.
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind：谷歌 DeepMind 发布 Gemma 4 系列开源模型，基于 Gemini 3 研究打造，包含 31B、26B、4B、2B 四个规格，支持思维链推理、多模态及 140 种语言。31B 版本在 AIME 2026、GPQA Diamond 和 Agent 工具使用基准上均超越此前最优模型。

items.title_en: Emotion Concepts and Their Function in a Large Language Model
items.title_zh: 大语言模型中的情绪概念及其功能：Anthropic 可解释性新研究
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic researchers published interpretability findings showing that Claude possesses internal representations of emotion-like concepts that causally influence its behavior. The research maps how features resembling emotions such as frustration, curiosity, and calm modulate the model's outputs, advancing mechanistic understanding of LLM internals.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Anthropic 研究人员发表可解释性研究成果，揭示 Claude 内部存在类情绪概念表征，并对其行为产生因果影响。研究描绘了挫败感、好奇心、平静等类情绪特征如何调节模型输出，深化了对大语言模型内部机制的理解。

items.title_zh: Qwen3.6-Plus 发布：面向真实场景的 Agent 能力大模型
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Alibaba released Qwen3.6-Plus, the latest iteration of its Qwen model series, with a focus on real-world agentic capabilities. The model is designed for complex multi-step tasks, improved tool use, and stronger reasoning in practical deployment scenarios.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：阿里巴巴发布 Qwen3.6-Plus，主打面向真实场景的 Agent 能力。该模型专为复杂多步骤任务设计，具备更强的工具调用能力和实际部署场景下的推理性能。
